parents.subject: LU-13912 lnet: Correct the router ping interval calculation

commit.subject: LU-13722 utils: lnetctl discrepancy in YAML output
commit.message:
LU-13722 utils: lnetctl discrepancy in YAML output

Use "max_interfaces" instead of "max_intf" in YAML output/input.
